source.document: Senus PLC – Information Document (Direct Listing on Euronext Access)
source.extractedBy: Claude (Anthropic) — AI-assisted document extraction, see scripts/extract_financials.py
source.note: All 'disclosed' fields are reproduced without material adjustment from Section 7.1 'Summary Financial Information' and supporting narrative in the Information Document. Fields marked derived=true are calculated from disclosed figures. No half-year (Dec 2025) results were publicly available at extraction time, so FY2024/FY2025 audited annuals are the model's base.

company.name: Senus PLC
company.formerName: ADF Farm Solutions Limited (trading as FarmEye until Sept 2024)

corporateEvents.event: Loamin Ltd acquisition completed (UK geospatial AI company)
Direct Listing on Euronext Access+ Dublin
€1.1m Private Placement completed ahead of Admission

dataGaps: No separate EBITDA / D&A disclosure in the Information Document — Operating Loss is the closest disclosed proxy for EBIT; a true EBITDA bridge is not calculable without a D&A figure.

No detailed debt schedule (interest rate, principal amortisation) is disclosed for the SBCI-backed term loan, so a Debt Service Coverage Ratio cannot be reliably calculated — flagged rather than estimated.

No full balance sheet (total assets, fixed assets, current liabilities in full) is disclosed — only summary net asset/liability and named working-capital lines — so ROCE cannot be reliably calculated. Given the FY2025 net liability position, ROCE would in any case be negative/not meaningful for a pre-profitability business.

No H1 FY2026 (six months to 31 Dec 2025) results were publicly available at the time of extraction; the Information Document notes trading was 'in line with expectations' and refers to a trading update expected Jan/Feb 2026, but no figures were published in the source materials reviewed.
